programs.title: Lavalantula
programs.desc: Volcanic eruptions in Los Angeles unleash a swarm of gigantic, lava-breathing tarantulas.

programs.title: Volcano
programs.desc: A Los Angeles emergency official takes charge when earthquakes and erupting lava ravage the city.

programs.title: The Gunman
programs.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Sean Penn) who suffers from PTSD goes on the run to clear his name.

programs.title: The Crow: Salvation
programs.desc: A mystical crow revives an innocent executed man (Eric Mabius) and helps him find a killer.

programs.title: Rampart
programs.desc: A veteran cop (Woody Harrelson) asserts his own code of justice on the streets.

programs.title: Killer Elite
programs.desc: A special-ops agent (Jason Statham) returns from self-imposed exile to rescue his kidnapped mentor.
